error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect or SNMP timed out

bandwidth_enable_disable.description:
Enable bandwidth collection for this device.

If you choose Attributes, bandwidth values are added to port entities (no history).
If you choose Sensors, separate bandwidth sensors are created (history).
bandwidth_enable_disable.title: Bandwidth Sensors

bandwidth_poll_interval.description: Set the polling interval used to calculate bandwidth/traffic.
bandwidth_poll_interval.title: Bandwidth Sensors

bandwidth_sensors.description: Enable optional RX/TX throughput and total traffic sensors for selected interfaces.
bandwidth_sensors.title: Bandwidth Sensors

environmental_enable_disable.description:
Enable environmental/PoE monitoring for this device.

If you choose Attributes, values are added to port entities (no history).
If you choose Sensors, separate sensor entities are created (history).
environmental_enable_disable.title: Environmental Sensors

environmental_sensors.description: Enable optional environmental and PoE monitoring for this device.
environmental_sensors.title: Environmental Sensors

init.description: Manage per-device overrides and advanced settings.
init.title: Device Options

user.description: Choose SNMP version and provide connection details.
user.title: Connect to your switch

snmpv2c.description:
Provide SNMP v2c community.

If you see an authentication error, confirm the community string on the device.
snmpv2c.title: SNMP v2c

snmpv3.description:
Provide SNMP v3 credentials.

- **Authentication protocol:** HMAC-SHA or HMAC-MD5
- **Privacy protocol:** None or CBC-DES (device dependent)

Many devices require passwords between 8 and 31 characters and may reject special characters.
snmpv3.title: SNMP v3

error.invalid_oid: Invalid OID format (must be numeric dotted OID)
error.required_attestation: You must attest that you have tested the OID
error.authorization_pending: Authorization pending. Please enter the code on GitHub and try again.
error.github_error: Failed to communicate with GitHub. Please try again later.
error.required_share: Since you verified the OID, please also select the option to share it with the community to help others.
error.required_attestation_to_share: You must attest that you have tested the OID before sharing it with the community.
error.required_all_attestations_to_share: You must check all three attestation checkboxes to submit to GitHub.
error.duplicate_oid: This OID already exists in the database for this vendor.
error.invalid_float: Invalid numeric scale factor (must be a float like 1.0 or 0.1)

bandwidth_enable.description: Turn bandwidth sensor entities on or off for this device.
bandwidth_enable.title: Bandwidth Sensors

bandwidth_enable_disable.description:
Enable bandwidth collection for this device.

If you choose **Attributes**, bandwidth values are added to port entities (no history).
If you choose **Sensors**, separate bandwidth sensors are created (history).
bandwidth_enable_disable.title: Bandwidth Sensors

bandwidth_exclude_rules.description: Add or remove exclude rules. Exclude rules always take precedence.
bandwidth_exclude_rules.title: Bandwidth Sensor Exclude Rules

bandwidth_icons.description: Optional icon overrides for bandwidth sensors. Leave blank to use defaults.
bandwidth_icons.title: Bandwidth Sensor Icons

bandwidth_include_rules.description: Add or remove include rules. If any include rules are set, only matching interfaces will get bandwidth sensors.
bandwidth_include_rules.title: Bandwidth Sensor Include Rules

bandwidth_poll_interval.description: Set the poll interval for bandwidth sensors. Lower intervals update more often but increase SNMP load.
bandwidth_poll_interval.title: Bandwidth Sensors

bandwidth_sensors.description: Enable optional RX/TX throughput and total traffic sensors for selected interfaces.
bandwidth_sensors.title: Bandwidth Sensors

builtin_filters.description:
Enable or disable built-in vendor interface filter rules for this device.

Disabled rules will not be applied during interface discovery.
builtin_filters.title: Built-in Vendor Filters

connection_and_naming_overrides.description:
Optional per-device overrides. Leave blank to use values from initial setup.

### SNMP Version
All fields are always visible due to Home Assistant limitations. Only the selected **SNMP version** determines which fields are used.

### SNMP v2c
Use **SNMP community override** and **SNMP port override** only if you need to override initial setup values.

### SNMP v3
Fill in **SNMPv3 username** and authentication/privacy settings when SNMP v3 is selected. Many devices require passwords between 8 and 31 characters and may reject special characters.
connection_and_naming_overrides.title: Connection & Name

feature_overrides.description: Manage custom OID overrides for specific features.
feature_overrides.title: Feature OID Overrides

ask_pr.description: Do you want to submit this override to the repository to help other users?
ask_pr.title: Submit to GitHub?

submit_pr.description:
To submit your override, please authenticate with GitHub:

1. Go to {url}
2. Enter code: **{code}**
3. Once you get the green check on GitHub, click Submit.
submit_pr.title: Authenticate with GitHub

port_name_rules.description:
Customize how interface names are displayed in the UI and card.

Built-in rules are provided as examples and can be disabled per device.
port_name_rules.title: Interface Name Rules

port_rename_custom.title: Custom Rename Rules
port_rename_custom.description:
Add, edit, or remove custom rename rules.

Rules are applied in order and take priority over built-in rename rules.

Tip: When editing, leave Replacement blank to keep the existing replacement (use Remove + Add to set an empty replacement).

port_rename_custom_add.description:
Create a regex rule that transforms the displayed interface name.

Example pattern: ^Gi(\\d+)/0/(\\d+)$
Example replace: Uplink-\\1-\\2
port_rename_custom_add.title: Add Rename Rule

port_rename_custom_edit.description: Select an existing rule to edit.
port_rename_custom_edit.title: Edit Custom Name Rule

port_rename_custom_remove.description: Select a custom rule to remove.
port_rename_custom_remove.title: Remove Rename Rule

port_rename_defaults.title: Built-in Rename Rules

interface_ip_display.description: Control how IP addresses are shown on interfaces.

data.hide_ip_on_physical_interfaces: Hide IP field on Physical Interfaces

data_description.hide_ip_on_physical_interfaces: When enabled, IP addresses will only be shown on virtual or logical interfaces (such as VLAN or management interfaces).
